title: Pocket Dimension
description: Harness the ability to travel a glitched broken reality, but beware of the bugs.
body:
![Pocket Dimension logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4cdcf069338c7e1de916b8a6c29d5ffe5807236d.png)

## Having trouble getting through a wall, out of a cave, or traversing underwater? Fear not, as the Pocket Hole is here to help!
Utilize this new item to transport your identity into an altered reality state without boundaries! However, you need to be very cautious when utilizing this tool, as it is deeply unstable, as is this altered reality.

![Gif switching between the overworld and the Pocket Dimension.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fd2341942eb845f00793afe6bd40b25f8c2bf17.gif)

Y̵̷̷̧̨͇͍̻͙̪̲͉͎͔͍̦̣ͧ̇͑ͩ̾̔͒ͬ̈̉͋̃ͭͮ͢͝ͅO͓͙͓͕͍͙̓͋̀̄͒͛̎̉̊̐͟Ư̶̧̱̻̞̮̯͚͈̯͇̦̲̙͓͕̒ͨ̐͒̈́̈́̂̚͜͢͝Ŕ̶̭̥̹̪̤̈̏̈́̀͌̆͆_̛_̡̥̜͔̘̠̻͚͍̂̃̑ͧ́̀ͫ̿ͧ͆̎̀ͨ̃͋͛̋ͦ̕ R̨͖̳̪͎̤̪͙̫ͩ̊͗̉̏̐ͥ͒͢͠Ȩ̴̴̴̵̡̘̫͔͇͖̟̣̘͓̮̻̹̭̪̝͖̲͍̔̄͛̎̿ͭ̌͋̂̐̀̃͆̌͗̐̚ͅA͎L̖͙͍̔̃̉̒I̷̼͇̲̱ͬ̿͊̿̏̽̉ͩ͠ͅͅŢ̹͖͍̼̖͈̭̠̓̅̉̐̆Y̗̼͍͔̯̮͍ͬ͋ͬ͒͆͋͑̓̀̌ͮͣ͞͝ Ĭ̶̸̥̇͒̍̊ͧ̚S̷̶̡͚͍̰̼͕͕̜̀́̿̒ͪ͑́ͮ̐̾ͩͬ͗͟ͅ N̶̴̵͉̱̱̗̫̱̩̥͚͉̬͔͇̼̳͕̩̠̩̭̏̈ͩͣ͊̃ͦͧ̒ͪͧ͗Ȍ̶͔̻̩̣̦̫̭̥͍̖͎̩̩̫͕̲͛͆̔̽̈ͮ̊͆͒͛ͭ̌͊ͧ̿̕̚͜͢͠T̸̴̶̡͎̖̩͉̫͓̩͇̜̩͍̳ͭ̊͑̓̉̽̉̋̅ͪ̏͒̚͘ͅ A̵̧̧̨͚̮̳̯̟̹̹̭͚̟̟͖̐̒ͮ̓̄͋͋ͮͥ̂ͮ̈͂̕_̵͖̻̰S̱̈̄͒͋ͩ͆͡ I̴̸̴̹͉̮̓̏̂̈́̏͜͟Ţ̸̡̮̪̼͚̥̦̩̹̀̀ͦ̐̂͆͆͗̓̂ͧ̚͢_͢͡ S̴̛̮̜͓̤̾ͣ̉ͪ͗̈̐̉̽͑̔̎ͪ̊_̶̮̞͎̘͇̒̔̽͐ͯ̕͡Ę̴̦͉̻̝̬͔̰̃ͪ̌͐ͦͯͣ̐̕E̷̴̜̖̲̪̓͛͆̊͛ͬ̑͘M̴̡̫̹͙͚͕̠̞̝̙͈̑͑̋̔ͪͣ̑ͦ͑ͩ͊̒̽̓̀ͣͫ̈̂͢͝͝S̔.̤̠͈̻̞͕̖̗̙̟̰͓ͧ́͐́̍ͮ͌̆̍̒͗̇͢͝͡

Do you think you have what it takes to traverse this broken world? Can you harness it and use its errors for your own benefit? Download today and figure out just how YOU will use your new best friend, the Pocket Hole!

Beware the bugs that roam.

_Note: This is not a horror mod, nor is it intended as such._
